hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: Following Up: Tracking Progress on Tasks
lesson.menu_desc: Check what is done and what is left with the present perfect -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 19 -- Following Up: Tracking Progress on Tasks
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 19 -- Following Up: Tracking Progress on Tasks

listenings.text: Hi team, this is Daniel. I want a quick update on the order for the big client. Let me check the progress. We have already sent the contract, and the client has signed it. Good. We have not received the deposit yet, so please follow up with the bank today. The first shipment has arrived at the warehouse, but the second one is still on the way. We are a little behind schedule, but I think we are still on track for the deadline. Has anyone finished the report for the client? Please tell me what is complete and what is not. Thank you.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Here is the progress on the order. I have already finished the report, and I have sent it to you this morning. The client has confirmed the new price. Good news: the bank has just sent the deposit, so that part is complete now. The second shipment has not arrived yet, but the driver says it is close. We were behind schedule, but now we are back on track. I have not called the client today, so I will do that next. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: Let me check the progress on this order. We have already sent the contract. The client has signed it, but the deposit has not arrived yet. We are a little behind schedule, but we are still on track. Has the report finished? Please tell me what is complete.
